markdown.markdown:
```{=html}
An interactive tool that takes any game situation as input and returns ranked formation-play call recommendations, uncertainty estimates, and reliability warnings — powered by the eight Random Forest models trained in this thesis.
``` The app has two main panels: the **Game Situation** input panel above, and the **results panels** below. Enter your scenario using the inputs below, then click **Get Recommendation**. ```{=html}

📋 Input Reference Guide

Input What to Enter Example
Down The current down (1st through 4th) 3rd
Yards to Go Yards needed for a first down or touchdown 3
Yards from Opponent End Zone Distance from the opponent's end zone (1 = goal line, 99 = own 1-yard line) 35
Score Differential Your team's score minus the opponent's score. Negative = trailing. -7 (trailing by a touchdown)
Seconds Remaining in Half Seconds left in the current half (0–1800). Two-minute warning = 120. 450 (7:30 left)
Quarter Current quarter (1–4) 4
QB Quality Tier Select the tier that best describes your quarterback's skill level Above Average
Simulations Number of Monte Carlo simulations (more = slower but more precise). At least 1,000 recommended. 10,000
``` ## Understanding the Outputs Once you click **Get Recommendation**, the app produces five output panels: - **Situation Summary** — confirms the game situation you entered as labeled value boxes (down & distance, field zone, score differential, time remaining) - **Primary Recommendation** — the top-ranked formation-play type combination for this situation, with expected EPA and conversion probability, combined with a backup play and its respective predicted EPA - **Data Reliability** — flags any formation options with insufficient training data, so you know which recommendations are data-supported and which should be treated with caution - **Full Rankings** — a complete table ranking all four options (Shotgun Pass, Shotgun Run, Under Center Pass, Under Center Run) by mean EPA, with confidence intervals, conversion probability, boom/bust rates, and reliability tier - **EPA Distributions, Mean EPA with CI, Conversion Probability, Training Sample Size** — four diagnostic charts showing the underlying uncertainty in each recommendation ### QB Quality Tier Reference | Tier | Approx. EPA/play score | Example calibration | |------|----------------------|---------------------| | Elite | ~+1.40 | Top-5 QB season | | Above Average | ~+0.72 | Starting caliber, performing well | | Average | ~+0.13 | Median NFL starter | | Below Average | ~−0.36 | Struggling starter or backup | | Replacement Level | ~−1.20 | Practice squad / emergency starter | --- ## The App ```{=html}
``` > **Having trouble loading?** The app may take 15–30 seconds to start up if it has been idle. If it does not load, [open it directly in a new tab](YOUR_SHINY_APP_URL_HERE){target="_blank"}.
